title: First-Line Supervisors of Firefighting and Prevention Workers
description: Directly supervise and coordinate activities of workers engaged in firefighting and fire prevention and control.

tasks.text: Assign firefighters to jobs at strategic locations to facilitate rescue of persons and maximize application of extinguishing agents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide emergency medical services as required, and perform light to heavy rescue functions at emergencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess nature and extent of fire, condition of building, danger to adjacent buildings, and water supply status to determine crew or company requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Communicate fire details to superiors, subordinates, or interagency dispatch centers, using two-way radios.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Serve as a working leader of an engine, hand, helicopter, or prescribed fire crew of three or more firefighters.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct and drill fire department personnel in assigned duties, including firefighting, medical care, hazardous materials response, fire prevention, and related subjects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain fire suppression equipment in good condition, checking equipment periodically to ensure that it is ready for use.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate the performance of assigned firefighting personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct the training of firefighters, assigning of instructors to training classes, and providing of supervisors with reports on training progress and status.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform maintenance and minor repairs on firefighting equipment, including vehicles, and write and submit proposals to modify, replace, and repair equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule employee work assignments and set work priorities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor fire suppression expenditures to ensure that they are necessary and reasonable.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Participate in creating fire safety guidelines and evacuation schemes for nonresidential buildings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain required maps and records.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Drive crew carriers to transport firefighters to fire sites.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect stations, uniforms, equipment, or recreation areas to ensure compliance with safety standards, taking corrective action as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate fire station procedures to ensure efficiency and enforcement of departmental regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Direct firefighters in station maintenance duties, and participate in these duties.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend personnel actions related to disciplinary procedures, performance, leaves of absence, and grievances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform administrative duties, such as compiling and maintaining records, completing forms, preparing reports, or composing correspondence.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct investigation of cases of suspected arson, hazards, and false alarms and submit reports outlining findings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend equipment modifications or new equipment purchases.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise and participate in the inspection of properties to ensure that they are in compliance with applicable fire codes, ordinances, laws, regulations, and standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect and test new and existing fire protection systems, fire detection systems, and fire safety equipment to ensure that they are operating properly.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Study and interpret fire safety codes to establish procedures for issuing permits to handle hazardous or flammable substances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze burn conditions and results, and prepare postburn reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate size, location, and condition of fires.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Maintain knowledge of fire laws and fire prevention techniques and tactics.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan, direct, and supervise prescribed burn projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recruit or hire firefighting personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
